description_long: This is a modern tactical rifle with a camouflage-patterned receiver and handguard, featuring a collapsible black stock and a pistol grip for ergonomic handling. The barrel is long and fitted with a cylindrical suppressor at the muzzle, which is colored in a gradient from black to green. The rifle is equipped with a detachable box magazine and has a carry handle integrated with iron sights on top. The fore-end and stock are ribbed for improved grip, and the overall design suggests a weapon intended for urban or tactical use. The materials appear to be primarily metal with polymer components, and the finish is matte with some glossy highlights on the suppressor.
description: A modern tactical rifle with a camouflage-patterned body, collapsible stock, and a green-black suppressor. Features include a detachable magazine, ribbed grips, and integrated iron sights.
description_view_0: Front view showing the cylindrical suppressor and the narrow profile of the barrel and handguard.
description_view_1: Side view displaying the camouflage receiver, collapsible stock, pistol grip, detachable magazine, and full suppressor length.
description_view_2: Rear view highlighting the stock, pistol grip, and the alignment of the suppressor with the barrel.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the same features as view 1, with details of the handguard and magazine visible.
